confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this object?
failedToReachBackend: Failed to reach backend on port
objectNameTooltip: Display name for the selected object.
lockedTooltip: Prevent editing the object in the scene.
objectUUIDTooltip: Immutable identifier for the object instance.
positionTooltip: Location of the object in meters.
scaleTooltip: Scale of the object along each axis.
rotationTooltip: Rotation of the object in degrees.
objectLocked: This object is locked and cannot be edited.
selectObjectPrompt: Select an object from the tree to edit its properties.
gridConfigurationDescription: Set the base grid extent and transform snap distance.
gridSizeTooltip: Base visible grid extent in meters. The grid expands automatically as the camera moves higher.
gridSnapSizeTooltip: Distance between snapped transform positions in meters.
createSpaceDescription: Create a separate 3D scene and make it active.
confirmDeleteSpace: This permanently deletes the space and all objects inside it.
ambientColorTooltip: Base light color applied evenly across the scene.
ambientIntensityTooltip: Strength of the scene-wide ambient light.
sunlightColorTooltip: Color of the directional sun light.
sunlightIntensityTooltip: Strength of the directional sun light.
sunElevationTooltip: Vertical angle of the sun in degrees.
sunAzimuthTooltip: Horizontal direction of the sun in degrees.
defaultViewportTooltip: Open this space from this saved camera position.
hintMeasureDistance: Double-click on 2 points to measure distance
hintMeasureAngle: Double-click on 3 points to measure angle
hintWallEnd: Click to set the end point of the wall
hintWallStart: Click to set the start point of the wall
hintAddDoor: Select a wall, then click to add a door
hintAddWindow: Select a wall, then click to add a window
generalConfigurationDescription: Rendering, debugging, and scene appearance settings.
defaultSpaceDescription: Space shown when the card opens. In view mode, this can only be changed in the card configuration.
visualizationOnlyDescription: Hide editing controls and object tree, while allowing navigation and object interaction.
antialiasingTooltip: Smooth jagged geometry edges when the WebGL context is created.
toneMappingTooltip: Map high dynamic range lighting into the display color range.
resolutionTooltip: Render at a lower internal pixel ratio to improve performance.
shadowMapEnabledTooltip: Enable shadow-map rendering for lights and mesh objects.
shadowMapTypeTooltip: Choose the shadow filtering algorithm used by the WebGL renderer.
bokehDepthTooltip: Blur geometry in front of and behind the current camera focus point.
bloomTooltip: Add a glow around the brightest parts of the scene.
gtaoTooltip: Enable high-quality ground-truth ambient occlusion. Enabling GTAO disables SSAO.
ssaoTooltip: Enable screen-space ambient occlusion. Enabling SSAO disables GTAO.
halftoneTooltip: Render the scene with a printed-dot halftone pattern.
filmGrainTooltip: Overlay animated film-like grain on the rendered scene.
focusDistanceTooltip: Distance from the camera to the depth-of-field focus plane.
apertureTooltip: Depth-of-field strength; larger values produce a shallower focused region.
maximumBlurTooltip: Maximum screen-space blur applied by the depth-of-field effect.
screenSpaceRadiusTooltip: Interpret GTAO radius in screen space instead of scene units.
developmentModeTooltip: Show the backend connection message and build timestamp.
geometryParameterTooltip: Rebuilds the mesh with this three.js geometry constructor parameter.
materialTextureTooltip: Choose an image file to apply as a new material texture.
clearMaterialTextureTooltip: Remove the current image texture from the material.
